lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a long way out from the city.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I know. We guards usually stay by banks and shops, but I got sent all the way out here to keep an eye on the brigands loitering just south of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It sounds more exciting than standing around guarding banks and shops.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: It's not too bad. At least I don't get attacked so often out here. Guards in the cities get killed all the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Honestly, people these days just don't know how to behave!
